mano_cua.result_summary: 日期选择器输入框点击不弹出下拉面板：点击输入框文字区域（显示2010/09/30）只进入文字编辑状态，日历面板未弹出。只有点击右侧日历图标按钮才能弹出日期选择器。与预期'点击输入框即弹出日历面板'不符
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Testing datepicker input popup: clicking the text input area enters text edit mode but does NOT open the calendar dropdown. Only clicking the calendar icon button opens the datepicker panel. This confirms the bug described in PR #471.
